<!--
Single PR carrying the full feature? Fill every section. The discovery / spec / plan docs were committed earlier in this same branch — link to them at the paths below.
Draft PR opened mid-stream (only discovery committed so far, spec and plan still to come)? Keep `Closes #N` so it auto-closes the issue on final merge, and delete the Spec / Plan link lines until those commits land.
Trivial PR (typo, lockfile bump, one-line fix)? Delete the Discovery / Spec / Plan link lines and note "trivial — no spec needed" in Summary.
Multi-PR feature (rare — only when context-window management forces a split)? Use `Refs #N` on intermediate PRs and `Closes #N` on the final slice. The plan doc names the slice in each PR's body.
See CLAUDE.md → "One feature = one branch = one PR" for the full convention.
-->

Closes #

**Spec doc:** `docs/<SLUG>.spec.md`
**Plan doc:** `docs/<SLUG>.plan.md`
